name: View
summary: Render or open resources in a URI-addressable viewer.
description: View is an if-uri urirun connector for render or open resources in a URI-addressable viewer. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover View capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use view:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
